infringements.steward_decision_summary: 2026 BRITISH GRAND PRIX 03 - 05 July 2026 From The Stewards To The Team Manager, Visa Cash App Racing Bulls F1 Team Document 45 Date 04 July 2026 Time 14:43 The Stewards, having received a report from the Race Director, summoned (documents 40 & 41) and heard from the drivers and team representatives

raw_text_excerpt:
2026 BRITISH GRAND PRIX
03 - 05 July 2026
From The Stewards
To The Team Manager,
Visa Cash App Racing Bulls F1 Team
Document 45
Date 04 July 2026
Time 14:43
The Stewards, having received a report from the Race Director, summoned (documents 40 & 41)
and heard from the drivers and team representatives, have considered the following matter and
determine the following:
No / Driver 30 - Liam Lawson
Competitor Visa Cash App Racing Bulls F1 Team
Time 12:27
Session Sprint
Fact Abnormal change of direction by Car 30 at Turn 15 (change of direction after the
deceleration phase had commenced).
Infringement Breach of Appendix L, Chapter IV, Article 2 b) of the International Sporting Code.
Decision Driver: Warning.
Reason The Stewards heard from the driver of Car 30 (Liam Lawson), the driver of Car 6
(Isack Hadjar), the team representatives and reviewed video, telemetry and in-car
video evidence.
The matter concerned the defensive move by Car 30 on the approach to Turn 15 on
Lap 16 while defending position against Car 6.
The driver of Car 30 stated that, at the relevant time, he was still at full throttle and
had not yet commenced braking, and that the movement of the car was part of
decelerati
